rows.recommendedPreviousAction: Keep current enum-like validator until a later source inspection confirms whether left/right/top/bottom are exhaustive; parser acceptance alone is insufficient.
rows.officialConsumerSemantics: Master layout checks left/right/top/bottom; any other string falls back to left.
rows.unknownValueBehavior: accepted by parser; consumed as left fallback
rows.recommendedFutureValidatorPolicy: keep current conservative finite choice left/right/top/bottom; do not broaden to arbitrary strings

rows.recommendedPreviousAction: Treat as source-research-needed; later validator repair should inspect list grammar, bounds, empty-list behavior, and normalization before changing acceptance.
rows.officialConsumerSemantics: Scrolling layout splits the string by comma, parses each item with stof, clamps each width to 0.05..1.0, logs invalid items, and uses defaults if no valid width remains.
rows.officialGrammar: comma-separated float list; invalid tokens skipped by consumer; final values clamped
rows.recommendedFutureValidatorPolicy: use comma-separated finite float list with future decision whether to reject out-of-range values or accept and normalize/clamp explicitly
